name: cozy cot
hints: You are lying in the cot. There is a note here with important information.
READ NOTE for clues about your voyage and objectives. GET NOTE to take it with you.
TAKE UP or GET UP to stand and return to the cabin. The note contains important sailing or quest instructions.
notes: Inside the cot in the ship's cabin. Contains a note with important quest clues. TAKE UP (get up) returns to the cabin (room 28). READ NOTE for sailing directions or quest hints.
